abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）正推动无线通信的智能化发展。由于数据受限、随机生成以及动态环境等因素，GenAI可能生成违反物理规律或偏离实际现实需求的信道信息或优化策略。我们将这一现象称为GenAI赋能无线通信中的“幻觉”问题，其导致无效的信道信息、频谱浪费及通信可靠性降低，但目前仍缺乏深入研究。为填补这一空白，本文系统地提出了GenAI驱动通信中无线幻觉的全面概念，并聚焦于幻觉抑制方法。具体而言，我们首先阐述了该问题的基本原理，基于GenAI的工作流程分析其成因，并在数据、模型和生成后三个层面提出相应的缓解方案。随后，我们系统性地考察了GenAI赋能通信中典型的幻觉场景及其对应解决方案。最后，我们提出了一种新型集成化幻觉抑制方法，用于GenAI-based信道估计。在数据层面，我们构建了一个信道估计幻觉数据集，并采用基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的数据增强技术；同时，引入注意力机制与大语言模型（LLMs），以提升训练与推理性能。实验结果表明，所提出的混合解决方案将归一化均方误差（NMSE）降低了0.19，有效减少了无线通信中的幻觉现象。

title: Manager-Executor: Collaboration Model Based on Hierarchy Multi-LLMs to Enhance the Efficiency of LLM Tasks
authors: Lichen Zhang, Wenke Li, Xinyue Huang, Zhenbo Zhang
publish: 2025 6th International Conference on Computers and Artificial Intelligence Technology (CAIT)
abstract: With the additional growth in natural comprehension, rationality, and generation for large language models (llMs), the inefficiencies, non-scaling, and non-coordination issues for the case with multiple agents grow more severe. In this work, we use an organizational structure-inspired collaboration model between Manager and Executor for our system. Our system offloads global planning and the sub-task decomposition for Manager agents with large capacities and reserve the rest for Executor agents with lightweights for taskexecution. A Model Context Protocol (MCP), a format-based communication protocol, is specified for standardized inter-agent coordination. To assess our model, we experiment with our model under three normal NLP tasks: long document summarization, multi-turn question answering, and structured table generation. In assist, we use a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) module as an auxiliary accelerator. Experimental results demonstrate significant gains for our model for the measures of task-execution efficiency, memory consumption, and coordination quality under the single-agent baseline measure. Comparison with the recent systems like HALO and Agent Orchestra reveals the superiority for our system with static task decomposition, structure-based communication, and role partitioning.
title_zh: 管理者-执行者：基于层级多大语言模型的协作模式以提升大语言模型任务的效率
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在自然理解、理性推理和生成能力方面的持续提升，多智能体场景下的效率低下、非可扩展性以及协作不协调等问题日益严重。本文提出一种受组织结构启发的协作模式，即由“管理者”与“执行者”两类智能体协同工作。我们的系统将全局规划与子任务分解交由具备强大能力的管理者智能体负责，而将具体任务执行交由轻量级的执行者智能体完成。为此，我们设计了一种基于格式的通信协议——模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP），以实现跨智能体间标准化的协调交互。为评估本模型，我们在三项典型的自然语言处理任务上进行了实验：长文档摘要、多轮问答以及结构化表格生成。同时，引入检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）模块作为辅助加速组件。实验结果表明，在任务执行效率、内存消耗以及协作质量等指标上，相较于单智能体基线模型，本模型取得了显著提升。与近期如HALO和Agent Orchestra等系统相比，本系统在静态任务分解、基于结构的通信机制以及角色分工方面展现出明显优势。

title: Optimizing High-Level Synthesis Sparse Matrix-Vector Kernel for Alveo FPGAs
authors: Federico Favaro, Ernesto Dufrechou, Juan P Oliver, Pablo Ezzatti
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) is a critical kernel in scientific computing and high-performance applications, yet it remains challenging to optimize due to irregular memory access patterns and low computational intensity. This work targets the AMD Vitis SpMV kernel on HBM-equipped Alveo FPGAs and introduces hardware-aware optimizations that significantly improve performance, especially in reduced precision scenarios. Building on prior evaluations of the Vitis kernel, we propose two key enhancements: coefficient grouping and index packet coalescing. These reduce padding overhead and improve memory bandwidth efficiency without requiring a complete redesign of the vendor-supplied kernel. Experimental results over 33 matrices from the SuiteSparse collection show up to 4× speedup and an average improvement of 1.6× compared to the original Vitis kernel. Our method demonstrates how practical architectural adaptations can yield substantial performance gains, supporting the growing trend toward lower-precision and energy-efficient computing in FPGA-based accelerators.
title_zh: 针对Alveo FPGA优化高层次综合的稀疏矩阵-向量核
abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-向量乘法（SpMV）是科学计算和高性能应用中的关键内核，但由于其不规则的内存访问模式和较低的计算强度，优化仍面临挑战。本文针对配备HBM的Alveo FPGA上的AMD Vitis SpMV内核，提出了一种硬件感知的优化方法，在低精度场景下显著提升了性能。基于对Vitis内核先前评估的基础上，我们提出了两项关键改进：系数分组与索引包合并。这些优化有效减少了填充开销，提高了内存带宽利用率，且无需对厂商提供的内核进行彻底重构。在SuiteSparse数据集中的33个矩阵上进行的实验结果表明，与原始Vitis内核相比，性能最高提升达4倍，平均提升1.6倍。本方法展示了通过实际的架构适配可实现显著的性能增益，也印证了FPGA加速器领域向低精度、高能效计算发展的趋势。

title: Customized Interior-Point Methods Solver for Embedded Real-Time Convex Optimization
authors: Jae-Il Jang, Chang-Hun Lee
publish: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
abstract: This paper presents a customized second-order cone programming (SOCP) solver tailored for embedded real-time optimization, which frequently arises in modern guidance and control (G&C) applications. The solver employs a practically efficient predictor-corrector type primal-dual interior-point method (PDIPM) combined with a homogeneous embedding framework for infeasibility detection. Unlike conventional homogeneous self dual embedding formulations, the adopted approach can directly handle quadratic cost functions without requiring problem re formulation. This capability allows the solver to directly address quadratic objective SOCP problems, while avoiding unnecessary performance degradation caused by the loss of sparsity due to problem reformulation. To support a systematic workflow, we also develop a code generation tool that analyzes the sparsity pattern of the problem to be solved and generates customized solver code using a predefined code template. The generated solver code is written in C with no external dependencies other than the standard library math.h, and it supports complete static allocation of all data. Additionally, it provides parsing information to facilitate the use of the solver by end users. Finally, benchmark and numerical experiments on an embedded platform demonstrate that the developed solver outperforms the existing solvers on problem scales typical of G&C applications.
title_zh: 用于嵌入式实时凸优化的定制内点法求解器
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种专为嵌入式实时优化设计的定制化二阶锥规划（SOCP）求解器，该类优化问题在现代制导与控制（G&C）应用中频繁出现。该求解器采用一种实际高效的预测-校正型原始对偶内点法（PDIPM），并结合同质嵌入框架以实现不可行性检测。与传统的同质自对偶嵌入方法不同，所采用的方法可直接处理二次代价函数，无需对原问题进行重新建模。这一特性使求解器能够直接求解具有二次目标函数的SOCP问题，避免了因问题重构导致稀疏性丢失而引起的性能下降。为支持系统化的开发流程，我们还开发了一款代码生成工具，该工具可分析待求解问题的稀疏结构，并基于预定义的代码模板生成定制化的求解器代码。生成的求解器代码使用C语言编写，除标准库math.h外不依赖任何外部库，且支持所有数据的完全静态分配。此外，该工具还提供解析信息，便于最终用户使用该求解器。最后，在嵌入式平台上的基准测试与数值实验表明，所开发的求解器在典型G&C应用规模的问题上，性能优于现有求解器。

title: Utilization of Google Gemini for Automated Assessment and Feedback to Enhance Programming Education at the Senior High School Level
authors: Jarot S. Suroso, Grace Amin, Liswandi, Achmad Cahyadi
abstract: The assessment of programming assignments in high school faces challenges with efficiency and feedback quality. Manual grading is slow and subjective, while conventional autograders typically only evaluate functional correctness, neglecting qualitative aspects like code readability and good programming practices. This research investigates the use of Large Language Models (LLMs), specifically Google Gemini, to develop a comprehensive automated system that provides both objective scores and in-depth, human-like qualitative feedback. A prototype was developed to analyze C++ tasks and evaluated through a direct comparative study, benchmarking Gemini's results against an expert teacher's assessment. Findings indicate Gemini has significant potential as a reliable tool, accurately identifying functional errors while also providing relevant insights into code quality. The novelty lies in its holistic approach beyond correctness and its pedagogical validation against a human expert. This Gemini-based system can bridge the gap between machine objectivity and human feedback, significantly enhancing programming education.
title_zh: 利用谷歌Gemini实现自动化评估与反馈，提升高中编程教育
abstract_zh: 高中编程作业的评估面临效率与反馈质量方面的挑战。人工评分速度慢且主观性强，而传统的自动评分系统通常仅评估功能正确性，忽视了代码可读性及良好编程实践等定性因素。本研究探讨了使用大型语言模型（LLM），特别是谷歌 Gemini，开发一个全面的自动化评估系统，能够提供客观评分和深入、类人化的定性反馈。研究团队开发了一个原型系统，用于分析 C++ 编程任务，并通过直接对比实验，将 Gemini 的评估结果与资深教师的评判进行对照。研究结果表明，Gemini 具有巨大潜力，不仅能准确识别功能错误，还能对代码质量提供相关且有价值的见解。该研究的创新之处在于其超越“正确性”的整体化评估方法，以及与人类专家的教育学验证。基于 Gemini 的这一系统有望弥合机器客观性与人工反馈之间的差距，显著提升编程教育的质量。

title: Spatiotemporal-Modal Cognitive Agents Based on Programmatic Reasoning
authors: Qing Yu, Tong Jing, Bin Zhang, Xuren Deng, Yunshan Lv, Heping Zhang
publish: 2025 6th International Conference on Computers and Artificial Intelligence Technology (CAIT)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain largely inept at directly handling spatiotemporal-modal data, and thus struggle with spatiotemporal computation and iterative, tool-assisted tasks. This artical introduces a programmatic-reasoning–enhanced framework for spatiotemporal-modal cognitive agents that decouples spatiotemporal computation from textual reasoning, markedly improving LLM performance on complex spatiotemporal analytics. We design a high-discipline prompting template—PlanTemplate—to elicit programmatic reasoning (PoT, Program of Thoughts), optimize PoT-style program-augmented prompting, and adopt the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to standardize tool encapsulation and automated execution. Experiments show that, relative to standard Chain-of-Thought (CoT), our approach improves accuracy by 40% on GSM-Hard and 18.6% on Terra benchmarks; first-attempt completion on spatiotemporal tasks reaches 55.6 – 67%, and response latency decreases by 67.5%. The study provides both theoretical underpinnings and practical guidance for deploying LLMs in urban spatiotemporal intelligence.
title_zh: 基于程序化推理的时空模态认知代理
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在直接处理时空模态数据方面仍表现不佳，因而难以胜任复杂的时空计算以及需要迭代和工具辅助的任务。本文提出了一种增强程序化推理的时空模态认知代理框架，该框架将时空计算与文本推理解耦，显著提升了LLM在复杂时空分析任务中的表现。我们设计了一种高规范性的提示模板——PlanTemplate，用于激发程序化推理（PoT, Program of Thoughts），优化基于PoT风格的程序增强型提示，并采用模型上下文协议（MCP）来标准化工具的封装与自动化执行。实验结果表明，相较于传统的思维链（CoT）方法，我们的方法在GSM-Hard基准上准确率提升40%，在Terra基准上提升18.6%；首次尝试即完成时空任务的比例达到55.6%–67%，响应延迟降低67.5%。本研究为在城市时空智能领域部署大型语言模型提供了理论基础与实践指导。

title: Research on the Construction and Application of Multi-dimensional Student portraits in the New Ecosystem of Digital Smart Teaching
authors: Wei Liu, Li Xu, Xiaohan Long, Xingzhi Chang, Juhua Yu
abstract: With the deepening of digital transformation in education, the construction and application of student portraits are becoming increasingly important. In order to comprehensively and objectively evaluate the comprehensive quality of students in the new teaching ecosystem, this study proposes a multi-dimensional method for constructing student portraits. Based on the self-built classroom data collection system, programming behavior data such as students' code files, debugging time, and code logs are collected in real time. By integrating five dimensions including basic attributes, learning behaviors, cognitive abilities, emotional attitudes, and development potential, a multi-dimensional student portrait model is constructed. In practical teaching applications, it has been found that the construction and application of multidimensional student portraits have significantly improved students' learning outcomes, while also helping teachers improve their control over the quality of course teaching.
title_zh: 数字化智慧教学新生态中多维度学生画像的构建与应用研究
abstract_zh: 随着教育数字化转型的不断深化，学生画像的构建与应用日益重要。为在新的教学生态系统中全面、客观地评价学生的综合素养，本研究提出了一种多维度的学生画像构建方法。基于自建的课堂数据采集系统，实时收集学生编程行为数据，包括代码文件、调试时间及代码日志等。通过整合基础属性、学习行为、认知能力、情感态度和发展潜力五个维度，构建了多维度的学生画像模型。在实际教学应用中发现，多维度学生画像的构建与应用显著提升了学生的学习成效，同时也有助于教师更好地把控课程教学质量。

authors: Karthik Vaidhyanathan
title_zh: 代理化转型：一场关于工具使用大模型、安全上下文与AI驱动工程的四集之旅
abstract_zh: None

title: Boosting Tool Calling Capabilities of Large Language Models via a Novel In-context Learning Approach
authors: Junhao Dong, Wei Zhu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in natural language understanding, yet they struggle with tasks requiring real-time information retrieval, complex computations, or integration with external tools. Tool calling has emerged as a key paradigm to extend LLM functionalities, but existing methods often rely on fine-tuning or generic retrieval models that are computationally expensive or suboptimal for task-specific demonstration selection. In this paper, we propose DRanker, a lightweight and effective in-context learning framework that enhances tool calling through intelligent demonstration retrieval and reranking. DRanker employs a fine-tuned reranker model, optimized with a ranking-aware loss function, to select high-quality demonstrations from a candidate set retrieved via dense embeddings. Evaluated on the ToolACE and BFCL benchmarks, DRanker consistently outperforms competitive baselines across multiple LLM backbones. Our work highlights the importance of task-aligned demonstration retrieval and offers a scalable solution for improving LLM-based tool calling without significant computational overhead.
title_zh: 通过一种新颖的上下文学习方法提升大型语言模型的工具调用能力
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在自然语言理解方面展现了令人瞩目的能力，但在需要实时信息检索、复杂计算或与外部工具集成的任务上仍存在挑战。工具调用（tool calling）已成为扩展LLM功能的关键范式，但现有方法通常依赖于微调或通用检索模型，这些方法在计算成本上较高，且在特定任务的示例选择上表现不佳。本文提出DRanker，一种轻量级且高效的上下文学习框架，通过智能的示例检索与重排序来增强工具调用能力。DRanker采用经过微调的重排序模型，结合面向排序的损失函数进行优化，从通过密集嵌入检索出的候选示例中挑选高质量示例。在ToolACE和BFCL基准上的评估表明，DRanker在多个LLM主干模型上均持续优于现有的竞争性基线。我们的工作凸显了任务对齐的示例检索的重要性，并提供了一种无需显著计算开销即可提升基于LLM的工具调用性能的可扩展解决方案。

title: Cultivating Security: Debug Authentication for Ensuring the Security of SoC’s Root of Trust
authors: Arash Vafaei, Sujan Kumar Saha, Mark Tehranipoor, Farimah Farahmandi
publish: 2025 IFIP/IEEE 33rd International Conference on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI-SoC)
abstract: Hardware-assisted debugging provides the necessary infrastructure for developers to closely monitor program behaviors at the microarchitectural level in a system-on-chip (SoC). However, debug infrastructure jeopardizes the security of the system by providing a backdoor for accessing crucial assets embedded in the system because of the inevitable increase in observability. While trusted execution environments (TEE) provide an extra level of security and isolate design assets, the security implication of hardware debug integration on TEEs has not been investigated. In this paper, we introduce a multi-level bidirectional access authentication mechanism over the debug module that defines the minimum number of privilege levels needed and the access details at each level so that debug users are authorized and blocked from accessing assets private to other entities. Trust is established by exchanging certificates both from the debugger and SoC sides to implement a bidirectional authorization platform in order to restrict the debugger’s access to SoC assets as well as prevent the debugger’s test data from being accessed by an SoC impersonator through emulation. We provide a prototype of the debug authentication platform on RISC-V architecture that proves the small overhead of the approach while staying compatible with traditional debug efforts.
title_zh: 培育安全：调试认证以确保SoC根信任的安全
abstract_zh: 硬件辅助调试为芯片系统（SoC）中的开发者提供了在微架构层面密切监控程序行为所需的基础设施。然而，由于可观测性的不可避免增加，调试基础设施会危及系统的安全性，因为它可能为访问嵌入系统中的关键资产提供后门。尽管可信执行环境（TEE）提供了额外的安全层级并隔离了设计资产，但硬件调试集成对TEE的安全影响尚未得到充分研究。本文提出了一种针对调试模块的多级双向访问认证机制，该机制定义了所需的最少特权级别以及每个级别下的访问细节，从而确保调试用户仅能获得授权访问，同时被阻止访问其他实体私有的资源。通过在调试器与SoC双方之间交换证书，建立信任关系，实现双向授权平台，以限制调试器对SoC资源的访问，并防止调试器测试数据被通过仿真冒充SoC的攻击者获取。我们基于RISC-V架构实现了该调试认证平台的原型系统，验证了该方法具有极小的开销，同时仍与传统的调试方案保持兼容。

title: Comparative Evaluation of State-of-the-art Generative AI Models Using QCA: Performance, Adaptability, and Precision
authors: Edrick Teddyatmaja, Sonya Rapinta Manalu, Sasmoko
abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) has advanced rapidly, producing models capable of generating text, images, audio, and video across diverse domains. Despite sharing foundations in deep learning and neural networks, these systems differ in architecture, optimization, and training methods. This study employs Qualitative Comparative Analysis (QCA) to systematically evaluate leading generative AI models—focusing on performance, adaptability, and precision—to identify causal configurations that explain their effectiveness. By integrating quantitative benchmarks with qualitative assessments, the study reveals trade-offs between speed, reasoning depth, and contextual sensitivity. Architectural and ethical dimensions, including bias, transparency, and computational efficiency, are also considered. Findings highlight that no single model is universally superior, and balanced capabilities across conditions drive broader utility. The results contribute to understanding how generative AI can be applied responsibly and effectively across academic, creative, and industrial contexts.
title_zh: 基于QCA的前沿生成式AI模型比较评估：性能、适应性与精确度
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（AI）发展迅速，已涌现出能够跨多个领域生成文本、图像、音频和视频的模型。尽管这些系统在深度学习和神经网络的基础上具有共通性，但在架构、优化方式和训练方法上仍存在差异。本研究采用定性比较分析（QCA）方法，对领先的生成式AI模型进行系统评估，重点关注其性能、适应性和精确度，以识别决定其有效性的因果配置。通过结合定量基准测试与定性评估，研究揭示了速度、推理深度与上下文敏感性之间的权衡关系。同时，研究还考量了架构设计与伦理维度，包括偏见、透明度及计算效率。研究发现，没有单一模型在所有情境下均表现最优，而是在多种条件下具备均衡能力的模型才具有更广泛的应用价值。研究成果有助于深入理解生成式AI在学术、创意及工业等领域的负责任且高效的应用路径。

title: A Case Study on the Migration of a High-Level PI Controller to ASIC-Compatible HDL Representation
authors: Francisca Donoso, Nelson Salvador, Jorge Marin, Christian A. Rojas, Gonzalo Carvajal
publish: 2025 IFIP/IEEE 33rd International Conference on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI-SoC)
abstract: This article presents a structured methodology for migrating digital control algorithms developed in high-level languages into synthesizable HDL suitable for ASIC implementation. A proportional-integral controller for a three-level flying capacitor converter is used as a representative case study to demonstrate the design flow. The methodology encompasses initial modeling using floating-point arithmetic, conversion to fixed-point representation, generation of reference models for validation, translation to C/C++, and high-level synthesis for HDL generation. Preliminary results consider co-simulation to ensure behavioral consistency between the high-level description and the generated HDL. The HDL was successfully synthesized using the open-source LibreLane tool-chain targeting the SkyWater SKY130 PDK. Ongoing work includes FPGA-based prototyping and detailed characterization of the ASIC. The proposed approach establishes a verified and systematic pathway for transitioning high-level control logic to ASIC-ready hardware implementations, preserving the original algorithmic behavior across abstraction levels.
title_zh: 一个关于将高级别PI控制器迁移至ASIC兼容HDL表示的案例研究
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种系统化的方法，将用高级语言开发的数字控制算法迁移至适用于ASIC实现的可综合HDL。以三电平飞跨电容变换器的PI控制器为例，作为典型案例来展示该设计流程。该方法包括：采用浮点数运算进行初始建模、转换为定点表示、生成用于验证的参考模型、翻译为C/C++代码，并通过高层次综合生成HDL。初步结果通过协同仿真验证了高层描述与生成HDL之间的行为一致性。所生成的HDL已成功使用开源LibreLane工具链，针对SkyWater SKY130 PDK完成综合。目前的工作还包括基于FPGA的原型验证以及对ASIC的详细特性分析。所提出的方案建立了一条经过验证且系统化的路径，实现了从高级控制逻辑到ASIC就绪硬件实现的平稳过渡，同时在不同抽象层次上保持了原始算法的行为一致性。
